patterns.message: generator core (src/generatedInstaller/) must not import package.json directly. Accept build/package-derived values (e.g. the installerer version) as an explicit parameter instead, see docs/adr/20260703T144753Z_generator-version-injection-boundary.md.

generator core (src/generatedInstaller/) must not import from src/cli/ (e.g. cliVersion). Accept the value as an explicit parameter instead, see docs/adr/20260703T144753Z_generator-version-injection-boundary.md.

no-restricted-globals.name: process
no-restricted-globals.message: generator core (src/generatedInstaller/) must not read process.env or other process state. Accept values as explicit parameters instead, see docs/adr/20260703T144753Z_generator-version-injection-boundary.md.
